The repeated mention of Mary treasuring or pondering the events surrounding Jesus' birth and childhood in her heart is significant for a few reasons. Firstly, it emphasizes Mary's role as a faithful disciple of Jesus, who sought to understand and reflect on the significance of his life and mission. Mary's actions demonstrate a willingness to learn from and meditate on the teachings and actions of Jesus, and serve as an example for other believers to follow.

Secondly, the mention of Mary treasuring these things in her heart also highlights the unique nature of Jesus' identity and mission. Luke's Gospel presents Jesus as the long-awaited Messiah, who came to save his people from sin and reconcile them to God. The events surrounding his birth, such as the angelic announcement to the shepherds, the prophetic declarations of Simeon and Anna, and the visit of the Magi, all point to Jesus' divine origin and purpose. Mary's reflection on these events further underscores their importance and helps to establish Jesus' identity as the Son of God.

Finally, the mention of Mary treasuring these things in her heart also serves to contrast her response with that of the other characters in the Gospel who do not understand or accept Jesus' message. Throughout the Gospel of Luke, Jesus encounters various individuals who struggle to comprehend or reject his teachings, such as the religious leaders who oppose him or the disciples who fail to grasp the significance of his mission. Mary's faithful reflection on the events surrounding Jesus' life stands in contrast to these other characters and serves as a model for how believers can respond to and grow in their understanding of God's word.

Haruka Nanase was always confident in his abilities as a swimmer. He loved the feeling of being in the water, the rush of adrenaline that came with competition. But as a college swimmer, he was starting to feel the pressure. The top swimmer, Albert, was always one step ahead, and Haruka was struggling to keep up.

Rin Matsuoka, Haruka's close friend and fellow swimmer, was also feeling the strain. He was training overseas in Australia, away from the support system he had in Tokyo with Haruka and their friends from the Iwatobi Swim Club. Rin and Haruka had a complicated relationship. They were close friends and rivals, but their unspoken feelings for each other were starting to become clearer.

One night, after a particularly rough practice, Haruka was walking home when he stumbled upon a young woman singing by the river. Her voice was beautiful, and Haruka was immediately drawn to her. They struck up a conversation, and Haruka found himself opening up to her in a way he never had before. He didn't know her name, but he couldn't stop thinking about her.

As it turned out, the girl was an inspiring professional mermaid. When she took a trip to Australia for a performance, she reconnected with her childhood best friend Rin Matsuoka. When she returned to Tokyo, she and Haruka ran into each other again, and they finally learned each other's names. Haruka was now conflicted with his growing feelings for the girl, especially since Rin also seemed to be falling for her.

The three of them became close friends, but the tension between Haruka and Rin was palpable. Both of them were struggling with their feelings for the girl, but neither wanted to admit it. They were also dealing with their own personal demons. Haruka was struggling with his confidence as a swimmer, and Rin was haunted by feelings of guilt over his father's abandoned swimming dreams and the death of his older brother.

As the three of them grew closer, the girl struggled with finding her own dream and guilt over feeling like she was the cause of her older brother's death years ago. Despite the angst and drama, Haruka and Rin both found themselves falling in love with the girl. They went from strangers to friends to lovers, but the journey was not without its difficulties.

As they all tried to navigate their feelings and overcome their personal obstacles, they were also preparing for college swimming and World Tournaments. Themes of slowburn romance, Ot3, platonic love, and friendship were intertwined with the drama of competition and personal growth. In the end, they all learned to face their fears and embrace their feelings, creating a love triangle that was filled with both angst and happiness.

The information in the `bluetooth_hid_notes.md` file in the Nintendo Switch Reverse Engineering repository provides a high-level overview of the Bluetooth HID protocol used by the Joy-Con controller to communicate with the Nintendo Switch. This information is used in the implementation of the Joy-Con controller protocol in the joycontrol library.

The `joycontrol/controller_state.py` file in the joycontrol repository implements a representation of the state of a Joy-Con controller. The information from `bluetooth_hid_notes.md` is used to define the format and content of the HID reports that are sent and received by the Joy-Con controller, and the code in this file uses that information to implement a data structure that represents the state of the controller.

For example, the information in `bluetooth_hid_notes.md` describes the format of the HID reports that are used to represent button presses and stick movements on the Joy-Con controller. The code in `joycontrol/controller_state.py` uses that information to define a class that represents the state of the controller, including the button presses and stick movements. When a button press or stick movement is detected, the code updates the state of the controller and sends the corresponding HID report to the Nintendo Switch over Bluetooth.

In summary, the information in `bluetooth_hid_notes.md` is used in the implementation of the Joy-Con controller protocol in `joycontrol/controller_state.py` to define the format and content of the HID reports that are sent and received by the Joy-Con controller, and to implement a representation of the state of the controller.

TOUCHING LIVES 
A lifesaving liver transplant procedure was successfully done after being diagnosed with rare Wilson's disease 8 year old girl from Bihar, underwent a lifesaving liver transplant procedure at Indraprastha Apollo Hospitals after being diagnosed with rare Wilson's disease - a genetic disorder in which excess copper builds up in the body. Treatment includes lifelong medication to bind copper. However, some children can develop coma due to liver failure. Mortality rate is loo % in children who develop coma due to Wilson disease. 8 year old Anshika was admitted to Indraprastha Apollo Hospitals on 25 th March evening in a state of coma. Previously she was being treated at another hospital where her condition had deteriorated. At Apollo she was admitted under the supervision of Dr Anupam Sibal, Group Medical Director, Senior Pediat-ric Gastroenterologist, Apollo Hospitals Group along with his team including Dr Smita Mal-hotra and Dr Karunesh Kumar (Consultants, Paediatric Gastroenterology) and Dr Neerav Goyal, Senior Consultant, Liver Transplant, Indraprastha Apollo Hospitals. The child was immediately put on a ventilator and advised a liver transplant, she was parallely put on dial-ysis and plasma exchange therapy to remove copper and buy time for a pre-transplant eval-uation. 
Speaking about this life saving transplantation, Dr Anupam Sibal, Group Medical Director and Senior Pediatric Gastroenterologist, Apollo Hospitals Group said, "The complexi-ty of the case required us to support the child on ventilator immediately post her admission. Both her pre-surgical management and the seamless administration of the liver transplant surgery (with her donor being ABO Compatible) were a challenge. This was an exceptionally rare case where a living related liver transplant was performed within 31 hours of admission. Of the 432 pediatric liver transplants performed at the Apollo Liver Transplant Program, this is the first case of an emergency ABO incompatible living related liver transplant
